message:
feat: add gofmt + golangci-lint pre-commit hook (GH#2179)

Add .githooks/pre-commit that auto-formats staged Go files with gofmt
and runs golangci-lint --new-from-rev=HEAD --fix to catch lint issues
before they reach CI. The hook is auto-installed when running make install.

Closes #2179

Co-Authored-By: miteshashar <miteshashar@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+# Pre-commit hook: auto-format with gofmt and lint with golangci-lint.
+# Installed via: git config core.hooksPath .githooks
+# See also: make install (sets hooksPath automatically)
+
+set -euo pipefail
+
+# Only check staged Go files (Added, Copied, Modified)
+staged_go_files=$(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM -- '*.go')
+[ -z "$staged_go_files" ] && exit 0
+
+# Require golangci-lint
+if ! command -v golangci-lint &>/dev/null; then
+    echo "pre-commit: golangci-lint not found."
+    echo "  Install: brew install golangci-lint"
+    echo "  Or: go install github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/cmd/golangci-lint@latest"
+    exit 1
+fi
+
+# Auto-format and re-stage
+echo "$staged_go_files" | xargs gofmt -w
+echo "$staged_go_files" | xargs git add
+
+# Lint changed code with auto-fix; block on remaining issues
+golangci-lint run --new-from-rev=HEAD --fix || exit 1
+
+# Re-stage any auto-fixes from the linter
+echo "$staged_go_files" | xargs git add
